purpose: Establish scalable physical and logical structure.
guidelines: Code hierarchy under src/ (app/, components/, lib/, contexts/, types/).
Composition-based component architecture with hooks for reusable logic.
Interface-first design via TypeScript types and centralized API clients.

implementation.componentModel: React Server Components by default; 'use client' only when interactivity required.
implementation.contractsPath: src/types/ and src/lib/api/ (HTTP clients for Admin API).
